topic: Sleep stages explained: REM, deep, and why both matter
caption: Did you know your body has 3-5 sleep cycles per night? 🌃 Each cycle includes 3 stages: N1 (transition), N2 (light sleep), and N3 (deep sleep), followed by REM. 💤 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs better sleep. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏💕📚
